data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_ComeToShowMePokedex: PROF. BIRCH: Ah, {PLAYER}{KUN}!\pHave you come to show me how your\nPOKéDEX is coming along?
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_Cancel: Hm? Oh, you haven't caught enough\nPOKéMON to make it worthwhile.
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_SoYouveSeenAndCaught: Hmhm...\pSo, you've seen {STR_VAR_1} POKéMON,\nand you've caught {STR_VAR_2} POKéMON...
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_LessThan10: You should go into grassy areas more\nand look for POKéMON more carefully.
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_LessThan20: I guess you're getting the hang of it.\nBut, it gets harder from here.
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_LessThan30: Some POKéMON only appear in certain\nareas. You'll need to be persistent.
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_LessThan40: Well, it could use more quantity, but\nthis is looking more like a POKéDEX now.
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_LessThan50: This is coming along pretty good.\nKeep up the effort.
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_LessThan60: Are you using any RODS?\nThere are many POKéMON in the sea.
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_LessThan70: Instead of just catching POKéMON,\nhow about making them evolve, too?
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_LessThan80: This is going to be a fantastic POKéDEX.\nThat's the feeling I'm getting.
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_LessThan90: You've collected this many...\nYour talent is remarkable!
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_LessThan100: Have you visited the SAFARI ZONE?\pI hear there are some POKéMON that\ncan only be caught there.
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_LessThan110: You've finally reached the 100-kind\nmark. This is an impressive POKéDEX!
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_LessThan120: There might be POKéMON that can be\nfound using ROCK SMASH.
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_LessThan130: You should get some more POKéMON by\ntrading with others.
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_LessThan140: I've heard of POKéMON that evolve when\nthey come to fully love their TRAINERS.
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_LessThan150: I had no idea that there were so many\nPOKéMON species in the HOENN region.
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_LessThan160: On occasion, some POKéMON appear in\nlarge numbers like wild outbreaks.\lDon't miss opportunities like those.
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_LessThan170: One can get a very good idea about the\nPOKéMON of the HOENN region by looking\lthrough your POKéDEX.
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_LessThan180: I'd say you already qualify as a POKéMON\nPROFESSOR, and a good one, too!
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_LessThan190: With a POKéDEX this complete, you're\na real professional at this!
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_LessThan200: You're very close to completing this\nPOKéDEX. I can feel it in my bones!
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_OnANationwideBasis: Hmhm...\nOn a nationwide basis...\pYou've seen {STR_VAR_1} POKéMON,\nand you've caught {STR_VAR_2} POKéMON...
